questions.text: Which of the following is a natural material?
questions.explanation: Wood is a natural material obtained from trees. Plastic, glass, and nylon are man-made materials.

questions.text: Metals are good conductors of heat and electricity.
questions.explanation: Metals are good conductors of both heat and electricity due to the presence of free electrons in their structure.

questions.text: What is the difference between transparent and opaque materials?
questions.correctAnswer: Transparent materials allow light to pass through completely, while opaque materials do not allow any light to pass through.
questions.explanation: Transparent materials (like glass, air) allow clear vision through them. Opaque materials (like wood, metal) block all light.

questions.text: Materials that allow light to pass through partially are called ________.
questions.explanation: Translucent materials allow some light to pass through but objects cannot be seen clearly through them. Examples: frosted glass, butter paper.
